_comment: Bulk-import payload for appcontrol catalog. Use: appcontrol.ps1 import-catalog scripts/catalog.example.json  (or: appcontrol.sh import-catalog --file scripts/catalog.example.json). Each entry becomes a reusable component type_key that preloads default check/start/stop commands when a user adds a component in the map editor. Delete the fields you don't need — only `type_key` and `label` are required.

entries.label: Windows Service
entries.description: A Windows service managed via sc/net commands.

entries.label: File Presence
entries.description: Alive if a marker file exists.
